name_en: Chanel 24A Doctor Bag Mini In Stock
name_cn:
Chanel 24A Doctor Bag Mini In Stock
The most beautiful of the season! It really has to be the Haute Couture series~ The oil wax lambskin has a great texture, and even the opening method is so retro and fun 😜 The exquisite retro court-style shape is eye-catching, and it's a perfect finishing touch when worn 😎 The mini size can fit lipstick and compact powder, and the small size can fit a phone.
Mini: 9×13×4.5cm
Model: AS4109
